name: lucas-quality-gate
description: Deterministic CI/CD quality gate for AI-assisted codebases. Ratchet-based regression detection with AI as advisory layer only.

scripts.test:coverage:ci: echo "No test runner configured. Add jest/vitest and update this script." && exit 0
scripts.duplication:ci: echo "No duplication tool configured. Install jscpd and update this script." && exit 0
scripts.lint: echo "No linter configured. Install eslint and update this script." && exit 0
